title: Infosys to Drive Digital Transformation for Melbourne Archdiocese Catholic Schools
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a collaboration with Melbourne Archdiocese Catholic Schools to support a network-wide digital transformation initiative across about 300 schools. Infosys will deploy enterprise platforms including SAP S/4HANA Cloud, SAP SuccessFactors, identity and access management, and master data management to move MACS' core ERP systems to the cloud. The engagement is positioned as a managed services opportunity in the education sector, intended to improve operating efficiency, user experience, data management, scalability, collaboration, and future generative AI readiness. No deal value, duration, or financial impact was disclosed.
